title: Quick Hotbar Selector
description:
Esp: Utilidad para moverse cómodamente en la Hotbar.

Eng: Utility to move comfortably in the Hotbar.
:)
body:
Esp: Utilidad para moverse cómodamente en la Hotbar, si no te acomoda usar los botones laterales del mouse siempre puedes modificarlas desde la configuracion de teclas de minecraft :)

Eng: Utility to move comfortably in the Hotbar, if you don't like using the side buttons of the mouse you can always modify them from the Minecraft key configuration :)

![Keybinding in options](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64b8d884314b2e91b95c33a881f2f8a01d7a97d3_0.webp)
